title: Highcraft
description: Minecraft but high in the sky.
body:
HighCraft is a lightweight high-fantasy RPG pack about traveling between floating islands over a vast ocean.
Build your character, find rare equipment, explore unusual biomes, fight bosses, and use tools for easier movement - gliders, grappling hooks, and improved combat.

This pack creates the feeling of a small adventure without overwhelming you with mechanics.

Main mods:

- 🧙RPG series - RPG classes, skills, taverns
- ⚔️Better Combat, Combat Roll - combat overhaul
- 🍳Farmers Delight and addons - cooking overhaul
- 🪂Gliders - early-game flying between floating islands
- 🪝Grapple Hook (Hooked) - for fast travel through the mountains
- 🐝The Bumblezone - new dimension with lot of content
- ✨Enderscape - end dimension overhaul
- 🌳Verdance - new biome and silk moth mob
- 🪼Gipples Galore - gipple mob and new building blocks
- 🐉Bosses of Mass Destruction - new bosses with unique loot
- 🔮Better Enchanting - enchanting system overhaul
- 🛠️Lot of QoL mods - optimisation mods, bigger stacks, accurate blocks placement, smooth autojump, tree chop, waystones

Icon by [Luna4s](https://www.deviantart.com/luna4s/art/Pixel-Floating-Island-891553637).
